zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Elliot於1535年出生在英國時，他的父親John Elliot50歲，母親Margaret Shepey49歲。他於1557年2月3日與Jane Gedge在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 瑪麗 勒 包福 安德 聖 潘可拉斯 索 萊恩 煙雨 哥吉拉 哈洛福斯 宏尼 萊恩結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1546年住在英國越可爾紐藍德 霍爾。他去世於1595年12月26日在英國英格蘭艾可萊特爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可萊特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Elliot于1535年出生在英国时，他的父亲John Elliot50岁，母亲Margaret Shepey49岁。他于1557年2月3日与Jane Gedge在英国英格兰倫敦聖 瑪麗 勒 包福 安德 聖 潘可拉斯 索 萊恩 煙雨 哥吉拉 哈洛福斯 宏尼 萊恩结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1546年住在英国越可爾紐藍德 霍爾。他去世于1595年12月26日在英国英格兰艾可萊特爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可萊特爾。

nameMeanings.name: Elliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Elliott  .

variants.name: Elliott
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Eliot, a pet form of the Old Testament name Elijah, rendered in Greek as Ēlias and in Old French as Élie + the diminutive suffix -ot; compare Ellis . The name Aylett may in some cases also have been confused with or absorbed into Elliott.

Scottish (of Breton origin): perhaps, as some members of the Elliott clan believe, a Scottish variant of the Breton surname Elleouet, a habitational name from one of the hamlets named Allegot in Finistère.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Elliot was born in 1535, in England, his father, John Elliot, was 50 and his mother, Margaret Shepey, was 49. He married Jane Gedge on 3 February 1557, in St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Newland Hall, Yorkshire, England in 1546. He died on 26 December 1595, in Writtle, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Writtle, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Elliot est né en 1535, à Angleterre, son père, John Elliot, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Margaret Shepey, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Jane Gedge le 3 février 1557, à St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Newland Hall, Everwyck, Angleterre en 1546. Il est décédé le 26 décembre 1595, à Writtle, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Writtle, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Februar 1557 in St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, England, United Kingdom Jane Gedge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1546 hat er in Newland Hall, Yorkshire, England gelebt. Er starb am 26. Dezember 1595 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Writtle, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Writtle, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Elliotが1535年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Elliotは50歳，母Margaret Shepeyは49歳であった。1557年2月3日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト マリー ル ボウ アンド スト プアンクラス ソペル ラン ウィス アル ハロウズ ホーンエイ ランでJane Gedgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1546年にはイギリスヨークシュアイアニューランド ハルに住んでいた。彼は1595年12月26日にイギリスイギリスエセックスウリットルで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスウリットルにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary le Bow, London, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 메리 일 보 앤드 스트 파크라스 소퍼 랜 위스 앨 핼로스 호니 랜
ko.lifeSummary: Edward Elliot(이)가 1535년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Elliot(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Shepey(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1557년 2월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 메리 일 보 앤드 스트 파크라스 소퍼 랜 위스 앨 핼로스 호니 랜에서 Jane Gedge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1546년도에 영국 요르크실르 뉴랜드 홀에서 살았다. 그는 1595년 12월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Elliot nasceu em 1535, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Elliot, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Shepey, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Gedge em 3 de fevereiro de 1557, em St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Newland Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra em 1546. Ele faleceu em 26 de dezembro de 1595, em Writtle, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Writtle, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary le Bow, London, London, England: ст мэри л боу анд ст панкрас сопир лан вит алл холлоус хоуни лан, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Elliot родился в 1535 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John Elliot было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Shepey, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Gedge 3 февраля 1557 г. в местности ст мэри л боу анд ст панкрас сопир лан вит алл холлоус хоуни лан, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности нюланд холл, еркшир, Англия в 1546 году. Он умер 26 декабря 1595 г. в местности риттл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности риттл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.St Mary le Bow, London, London, England: St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Elliot nació en 1535, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Elliot, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Margaret Shepey, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Jane Gedge el 3 de febrero de 1557, en St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Newland Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra en 1546. Murió el 26 de diciembre de 1595, en Writtle, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Writtle, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
